title: Rewrite app/api/notifications/digest/route.ts to call service directly
acceptance_criteria: Route no longer imports getBackendConfig or getCircuitBreakerStatus
Route no longer fetches to PYTHON_WORKER_URL
Route imports and calls generateDigest from notification-engine service
Aggregates unread notifications by type for specified user(s)
Returns structured digest with notification counts by type
Supports admin-only access for bulk digest generation
